title: Revised Staff Reports - Federal Reserve Bank of New York

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This page is a catalog/index listing of revised staff reports from the New York Fed, organized by revision year (2006-2016), containing titles and metadata for approximately 50 research papers but no full-text content. The page is not a standalone archiveable document but rather a navigation interface to individual papers.
key_points: Page is a listing/catalog of New York Fed Staff Reports revised between 2006 and 2016
Contains approximately 50 paper titles with authors, original release dates, report numbers, and revision dates
Several papers have market structure relevance: repo market (758), dealer balance sheets (803), Treasury ECN microstructure (381), money market funds (753), and bond liquidity (796)
No actual research content or findings are included on this page—only metadata and titles
The page links to individual reports which are not accessible within this source body
why_it_matters: This source is not directly actionable for market structure or macro catalysts analysis. It is a catalog page that provides access to individual research papers, none of which are contained in this source. The individual papers would need to be accessed separately for their content.
market_structure_context: Many of the listed papers address market structure topics (repo markets, dealer balance sheets, Treasury microstructure, money market funds, bond liquidity) but their content is not present in this source.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page/catalog, prohibited per CORE RULE 6
No full-text content present—only titles, authors, and metadata for ~50 papers
event_type set to 'unknown' but should reflect the source type is catalog-index content rather than any standard taxonomy category
Cannot assess individual paper relevance or accuracy without access to their content
Source has no archival value as a standalone document

notes: Per CORE RULE 6: listing_page source type is non-archivable. This page contains no substantive research content—it is a navigation index. The actual research reports would need to be retrieved from individual URLs. Published_at field left blank as no single publication date applies to this index page; individual papers have varying original and revision dates (e.g., SR 758 revised October 2017, SR 381 revised March 2017).
